jd_text: The opportunity Unity is expanding its Skills Development Programs (SDP) across the Middle East , and we’re hiring a Program Delivery Manager (Contract) based in Abu Dhabi to lead delivery and regional execution. As part of Unity’s Customer Success organisation, the SDP team designs and delivers strategic upskilling programs that develop local talent, support economic diversification, and grow sustainable digital ecosystems. These programs are delivered in close partnership with government entities, academic institutions, and industry, aligning Unity’s real-time 3D tools and training with national transformation and workforce development agendas. This role offers a unique opportunity to help shape Unity’s long-term impact in the Middle East, supporting national skills strategies and empowering the next generation of creators, developers, and technologists. What you'll be doing Lead the delivery and operational execution of Skills Development Programs across the Middle East. Act as the regional owner for program delivery, coordinating with Unity’s global teams across Customer Success, Education, Sales, and Product. Partner closely with government stakeholders, public-sector entities, universities, and industry partners to deliver high-impact training initiatives. Localise global program frameworks to meet regional priorities, cultural context, and language requirements. Oversee program governance, timelines, risks, and reporting, ensuring high-quality delivery against agreed KPIs. What we're looking for Proven experience delivering large-scale training, education, or workforce development programs, ideally in partnership with government or public-sector organisations. Strong program delivery and operations capabilities, including stakeholder coordination, execution, and reporting. Experience working in the Middle East, with an understanding of public-sector, education, or national skilling initiatives. Fluency in Arabic and English (spoken and written) is required. Ability to operate effectively in complex, multi-stakeholder environments, balancing local needs with global program goal You might also have Experience with real-time 3D, gaming, simulation, digital twins, or interactive media. Familiarity with government-funded education, employment, or digital transformation programs in the UAE or wider GCC. Experience scaling programs across multiple institutions, regions, or cultural contexts. Knowledge of Unity products or similar digital creation platforms. Additional information Relocation support is not available for this position Benefits At Unity, we want our team members to thrive. We offer a wide range of benefits designed to support well-being and work-life balance. Please note: Benefits eligibility, specific offerings, and coverage vary based on the country and employment status. While specific benefits vary, here are some of the ways we strive to take care of our eligible team members globally: Comprehensive health, life, and disability insurance | Commute subsidy | Employee stock ownership | Competitive retirement/pension plans | Generous vacation and personal days | Support for new parents through leave and family-care programs | Office food snacks | Mental Health and Wellbeing programs and support | Employee Resource Groups | Global Employee Assistance Program | Training and development programs | Volunteering and donation matching program Life at Unity Unity [NYSE: U] is the world’s leading game engine, powering play for more than 3 billion consumers each month. The top mobile games in the world, the most played PC indie titles, the most innovative console games, and virtually all of the top XR and Web Games are developed, deployed, and grown in Unity. Unity also enables teams across industries like automotive, manufacturing, and healthcare to design, simulate, and collaborate in 3D — closing the gap between ideas and reality. For more information, please visit www.unity.com. Unity is a proud equal opportunity employer. We are committed to fostering an inclusive, innovative environment and celebrate our employees across age, race, color, ancestry, national origin, religion, disability, sex, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, or any other protected status in accordance with applicable law. Our differences are strengths that enable us to support the growing and evolving needs of our customers, partners, and collaborators. If you have a disability that means there are preparations or accommodations we can make to help ensure you have a comfortable and positive interview experience, please fill out this form to let us know. This position requires the incumbent to have a sufficient knowledge of English to have professional verbal and written exchanges in this language since the performance of the duties related to this position requires frequent and regular communication with colleagues and partners located worldwide and whose common language is English. Headhunters and recruitment agencies may not submit resumes/CVs through this website or directly to managers. Unity does not accept unsolicited headhunter and agency resumes. Unity will not pay fees to any third-party agency or company that does not have a signed agreement with Unity. Your privacy is important to us. Please take a moment to review our Prospect and Applicant Privacy Policies. Should you have any concerns about your privacy, please contact us at DPO@unity.com.
